title: isatis glauca subsp. iconia
intro: Isatis glauca subsp. iconia, also known as Chinese or wild baicalin plant, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its high content of isoflavones and other bioactive compounds, which possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Isatis glauca subsp. iconia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory infections, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
